ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reference_kinds" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference kind */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., REF_getField, REF_putField) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_kinds_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "framework_name" TEXT /* Name of the framework */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptive_names" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptive name */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the kind of reflection operation */,
  "descriptive_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the reflection operation */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptive_names_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptive_names_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES reference_kinds ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scopes" (
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scope */,
  "scope_name" TEXT /* Name of the scope (e.g., class, interface) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scopes_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of reflection operation */,
  "member_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the member (e.g., FT f;) */,
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the scope */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member is static */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member is final */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member is public */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member is protected */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_scope_id FOREIGN KEY ("scope_id") REFERENCES scopes ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES reference_kinds ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behaviors" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior entry */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of reflection operation */,
  "behavior_signature" TEXT /* Signature defining the behavior (e.g., (T) this.f;) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behaviors_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES reference_kinds ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behaviors_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member involved in the operation */,
  "operation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., get, set, invoke) */,
  "operation_user" TEXT /* User who performed the operation */,
  "operation_details" TEXT /* Details of the operation (e.g., values set, methods invoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member to which the rule applies */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the member (e.g., must be a string, must be an integer) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_validations_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_validations_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API endpoint */,
  "endpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the API endpoint */,
  "endpoint_description" TEXT /* Description of the API endpoint */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of reflection operation */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_endpoints_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_endpoints_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES reference_kinds ("reference_id")
)
